steps.title: Read vertex directly from vertex form
steps.content: $f(x) = \frac{1}{7}(x-6)^2 + 4$ is in vertex form $(h,k)$. Read off: vertex $= (6, 4)$.

steps.title: Vertex k = minimum because a > 0
steps.content: Since $a = \frac{1}{7} > 0$, the parabola opens upward, so the vertex is the minimum. Minimum height $= k = 4$ inches. That matches choice A — A is correct.
